problem id: 22e28f23
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND SHL(4)) XOR ROT(4)

examples:
  01110011 -> 00010111
  01100001 -> 00010110
  10101101 -> 10001010
  10110101 -> 00011011
  11100100 -> 00001110
  00000110 -> 01100000
  11111001 -> 00001111
  11100010 -> 00101110
  01111000 -> 00000111
  00110011 -> 00010011

query: 01010111
predicted answer: 01010101
